summary_en: 1,404,600 shares acquired for ¥21.0B (¥14,952/share) via open-market purchase on TSE, May 1–25, 2026. Represents 95.7% of 2.5M-share authorization limit (1.7% of S/O) and 99.9% of ¥21.0B price limit. Program originally authorized through March 31, 2027; early termination announced.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief:
Fuji Electric completed early termination of its treasury-stock acquisition program on May 26, 2026. The company acquired 1,404,600 ordinary shares between May 1 and May 25, 2026, via open-market purchase under a discretionary trading agreement with the Tokyo Stock Exchange, at a total cost of ¥20,998,986,500 (approximately ¥14,952 per share).

The board of directors authorized the program on April 28, 2026, setting an upper limit of 2.5 million shares (1.7% of issued share capital excluding treasury stock) and ¥21.0 billion. The original execution window was May 1, 2026, through March 31, 2027. With this acquisition, the program is now fully terminated, having consumed 56.2% of the authorized share count and 99.9% of the yen limit.
